---
title: "Terms of Use"
pagetitle: "Terms of Use | Stan Q. He"
description: "Legal notice and content use policy for this website."
---

This website is maintained by Stan Q. He as a personal portfolio and public home for selected projects, writing, and creative work. By accessing this site, you acknowledge the terms below.

_Last updated: June 2026_

## Ownership of Content

Unless otherwise stated, the original writing, photographs, portraits, graphics, project materials, visual design, and other content published on this site are owned by Stan Q. He.

All original materials are protected by applicable copyright and intellectual property laws.

© 2026 Stan Q. He. All rights reserved.

## Permitted Use

You may view, read, reference, and link to publicly available pages on this site for personal, educational, informational, or non-commercial purposes, provided that proper attribution is given and the original context is not misrepresented.

## Prohibited Use

Unless prior written permission is granted, the following uses are not permitted:

- Commercial use, exploitation, redistribution, or resale
- Copying, republishing, or reproducing site content in full or substantial part
- Modification, remixing, adaptation, or creation of derivative works
- Use in advertising, promotional, endorsement, or misleading contexts
- Removal, alteration, or obscuring of attribution, watermarking, or ownership notices
- Automated scraping, bulk collection, dataset creation, or redistribution of site materials

## Academic and Project Materials

Some projects, notes, analyses, and presentations on this site may reference public datasets, academic materials, software libraries, third-party tools, trademarks, or external sources. These materials remain the property of their respective owners and are subject to their own licenses, terms, and attribution requirements.

The inclusion of third-party materials does not imply endorsement, ownership, partnership, or affiliation unless explicitly stated.

## Fonts, Libraries, and Site Assets

This site may use open-source fonts, software libraries, icons, templates, or other third-party assets. These assets remain subject to their respective licenses and attribution requirements.

The use of a font, library, tool, or asset does not imply endorsement by its creator, maintainer, or rights holder.

## Images and Personal Media

Photographs, portraits, personal images, and visual assets on this site may not be downloaded, reused, edited, reposted, or used to create derivative works without prior written permission.

This website is intended as a public record of work and identity, not a media repository for third-party reuse.

## AI, Machine Learning, and Synthetic Media Use

Unauthorized use of any content from this site for AI, machine learning, biometric, or synthetic media purposes is prohibited.

This includes, but is not limited to:

- Training, fine-tuning, evaluating, or benchmarking AI models
- Building datasets, embeddings, face templates, or biometric profiles
- Synthetic media generation
- Facial animation, face swapping, or identity transfer
- Voice pairing or multimodal impersonation
- Creation of derivative, simulated, or lookalike representations

These restrictions apply regardless of whether the use is commercial, non-commercial, research, educational, or personal.

Nothing in this section limits use by the rights holder or with prior written permission.

## External Links

This site may include links to third-party websites, platforms, repositories, publications, or resources. These links are provided for reference and convenience only.

Stan Q. He is not responsible for the content, availability, accuracy, security, or privacy practices of external websites.

## No Professional Advice

The content on this site is provided for personal, academic, and informational purposes only. It should not be interpreted as legal, financial, investment, career, technical, or professional advice.

Any views expressed on this site are personal unless otherwise stated.

## Changes to This Site

Content on this site may be updated, revised, removed, or reorganized at any time without notice. These terms may also be updated from time to time.

## Contact

For permission requests, licensing inquiries, or questions about the use of content from this site, please contact Stan Q. He through the contact information provided on the [homepage](index.qmd).
